key_themes: Progress on marine decarbonization trials (e.g. MSC)
Path to commercialization of MSAR® and bioMSAR™ fuels
Management updates, directorate changes, and investor presentations
Penny stock volatility with recent gains on news
summary: Quadrise Plc (QED.L), a small-cap UK company developing cleaner synthetic marine and power fuels (MSAR and bioMSAR), released H1 2026 interim results in March highlighting continued progress on commercial trials, particularly with shipping major MSC, alongside an investor presentation and CEO interviews.[[1]](https://www.londonstockexchange.com/news-article/QED/interim-results-notice-of-investor-presentation/17513900)[[2]](https://seekingalpha.com/article/4887894-quadrise-plc-qdrsf-q2-2026-earnings-call-transcript) The stock has shown positive momentum, rising over 10% on some news days, up ~50% in a recent month at one point, and posting strong YTD returns from 2025 lows, though it remains pre-revenue with ongoing losses and noted project delays.[[3]](https://www.marketbeat.com/instant-alerts/quadrise-lonqed-trading-102-higher-should-you-buy-2026-04-15/) Investor and company sentiment centers on decarbonization tailwinds, trial execution, and long-term commercialization potential in a speculative micro-cap environment.
sources: 10+ web news/RNS articles (Yahoo Finance, LSE, Proactive, Reuters), 5 recent X posts (primarily company account and promoters), Interim results presentation and earnings call transcript (March 2026), Share price data and MarketBeat coverage
